name: Gamma Jack
description:
We've all seen that tiktok, right? It's basically that scenario 🙊 (you were assisting a supervillain, no details on how so you get to choose) it's anyPOV but hinting that you're somewhat feminine I made another Gamma Jack bot, VAMPIRE JACK 👅

Feel free to ask for other scenarios, I'll make any suggestions when I reach 100 followers 🗣 also ya'll sleeping on ts LISTEN TO THE FUCKING SONG I PUT ON THIS ONE OK THE BEATS GO SO HARD u gotta skip like 1:45 seconds of silence tho I'm not paying shit to soundcloud
